description: Build QuantEdits (CapCut + Canva + InstaEdit hybrid video/photo editor), QuantMax (TikTok + Omegle + Tinder hybrid), and QuantAI (central AI hub that controls all AI across the ecosystem and device control).
steps: Create apps/quantedits/package.json and apps/quantedits/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantedits/api/server.ts - Express server setup
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/projects.ts - Create/manage editing projects, auto-save, versions, collaborations
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/templates.ts - Template library (video, photo, social media, presentations), categories, custom templates
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/effects.ts - Video/photo effects, transitions, animations, text effects, stickers
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/export.ts - Export to all formats, quality settings, direct publish to ecosystem apps
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/assets.ts - Asset library (fonts, music, stock, icons, shapes, backgrounds)
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/ai.ts - AI editing (auto-edit, background removal, upscale, style transfer, auto-captions, voice cloning)
Create apps/quantedits/api/routes/collaboration.ts - Real-time collaborative editing, comments, approvals
Create apps/quantedits/api/controllers/ - All controllers
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/editor-service.ts - Core editing engine, layer management, timeline
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/render-service.ts - Video/image rendering pipeline
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/template-service.ts - Template management and rendering
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/ai-service.ts - AI editing features using packages/ai
Create apps/quantedits/api/services/publish-service.ts - Publish to QuantNeon, QuantTube, QuantSync, QuantMax
Create apps/quantedits/src/types/index.ts - QuantEdits types
Create apps/quantedits/src/pages/index.tsx - Project dashboard
Create apps/quantedits/src/pages/editor.tsx - Main editor workspace (canvas/timeline)
Create apps/quantedits/src/pages/templates.tsx - Template browser and preview
Create apps/quantedits/src/pages/projects.tsx - Project management
Create apps/quantedits/src/pages/assets.tsx - Asset library browser
Create apps/quantedits/src/components/Timeline.tsx - Video timeline with tracks, clips, transitions
Create apps/quantedits/src/components/Canvas.tsx - WYSIWYG design canvas with layers
Create apps/quantedits/src/components/ToolPanel.tsx - Editing tools panel (crop, resize, filters, text, shapes)
Create apps/quantedits/src/components/LayerPanel.tsx - Layer management panel
Create apps/quantedits/src/components/EffectsPanel.tsx - Effects and transitions browser
Create apps/quantedits/src/components/ExportDialog.tsx - Export settings and progress
Create apps/quantedits/src/components/AITools.tsx - AI-powered editing tools
Create apps/quantedits/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
--- QuantMax ---
Create apps/quantmax/package.json and apps/quantmax/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantmax/api/server.ts - Express server setup
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/feed.ts - Short video feed (TikTok-style), for-you algorithm, sounds, hashtags
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/create.ts - Create short videos, effects, duets, stitch, green screen
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/videochat.ts - Random video chat (Omegle-style), interests matching, reports, skip
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/matching.ts - Tinder-style matching, swipe, profiles, preferences, distance
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/messages.ts - Chat after matching, icebreakers, video messages
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/profiles.ts - Dating/social profiles, verification, prompts, photos/videos
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/discover.ts - Discover people, events, nearby, interests, groups
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/safety.ts - Safety features, reporting, blocking, identity verification
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/ai.ts - AI matching, conversation starters, content moderation, catfish detection
Create apps/quantmax/api/routes/live.ts - Go live, live events, virtual dating events
Create apps/quantmax/api/controllers/ - All controllers
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/matching-service.ts - Match algorithm, compatibility scoring
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/videochat-service.ts - Random pairing, WebRTC, moderation
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/feed-service.ts - Short video recommendation algorithm
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/safety-service.ts - Content moderation, identity verification
Create apps/quantmax/api/services/ai-service.ts - AI features using packages/ai
Create apps/quantmax/src/types/index.ts - QuantMax types
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/index.tsx - Short video feed (full-screen swipe)
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/videochat.tsx - Random video chat interface
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/matching.tsx - Swipe/matching interface
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/matches.tsx - Matches list and conversations
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/create.tsx - Video creation with effects
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/profile.tsx - Profile editor with prompts/photos
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/discover.tsx - Discover people and events
Create apps/quantmax/src/pages/live.tsx - Live events and streams
Create apps/quantmax/src/components/SwipeCard.tsx - Tinder-style swipe card
Create apps/quantmax/src/components/VideoFeed.tsx - Full-screen video scroller
Create apps/quantmax/src/components/VideoChatRoom.tsx - Video chat with controls
Create apps/quantmax/src/components/MatchProfile.tsx - Profile card for matching
Create apps/quantmax/src/components/SafetyOverlay.tsx - Safety/report overlay
Create apps/quantmax/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
--- QuantAI ---
Create apps/quantai/package.json and apps/quantai/tsconfig.json
Create apps/quantai/api/server.ts - Express server setup
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/assistant.ts - AI assistant (chat, commands, context-aware help, multi-modal)
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/device-control.ts - Phone control, laptop control, app automation, system commands
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/models.ts - Model management, fine-tuning, custom models, model marketplace
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/automation.ts - Workflow automation, triggers, actions, schedules, IFTTT-style
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/ecosystem.ts - AI control panel for all ecosystem apps, per-app AI settings
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/analytics.ts - AI usage analytics, performance metrics, cost tracking
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/training.ts - Custom model training, datasets, fine-tuning jobs
Create apps/quantai/api/routes/plugins.ts - AI plugin system, third-party integrations, API marketplace
Create apps/quantai/api/controllers/ - All controllers
Create apps/quantai/api/services/assistant-service.ts - Core AI assistant with memory, context, personality
Create apps/quantai/api/services/device-service.ts - Device control, screen reading, gesture simulation
Create apps/quantai/api/services/automation-service.ts - Workflow engine, trigger evaluation, action execution
Create apps/quantai/api/services/model-service.ts - Model loading, inference, fine-tuning orchestration
Create apps/quantai/api/services/ecosystem-service.ts - Cross-app AI coordination using packages/ai
Create apps/quantai/src/types/index.ts - QuantAI types
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/index.tsx - AI assistant chat interface
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/device.tsx - Device control panel
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/automation.tsx - Automation workflow builder
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/models.tsx - Model gallery and management
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/ecosystem.tsx - Ecosystem AI control panel
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/analytics.tsx - AI usage and performance analytics
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/plugins.tsx - Plugin marketplace
Create apps/quantai/src/pages/training.tsx - Custom model training interface
Create apps/quantai/src/components/ChatInterface.tsx - AI chat with multi-modal input
Create apps/quantai/src/components/DevicePreview.tsx - Device screen mirror and control
Create apps/quantai/src/components/WorkflowBuilder.tsx - Visual automation workflow designer
Create apps/quantai/src/components/ModelCard.tsx - AI model card with capabilities
Create apps/quantai/src/components/EcosystemMap.tsx - Visual map of all ecosystem AI connections
Create apps/quantai/src/components/PluginCard.tsx - Plugin install and config card
Create apps/quantai/src/services/api-client.ts - Frontend API client
acceptance_criteria: QuantEdits has full video editor with timeline, layers, effects, transitions, and export
Photo editor with canvas, tools, templates, and design features exists
AI editing tools (background removal, upscale, auto-caption, style transfer) are implemented
Direct publish to all ecosystem apps from editor works
QuantMax has TikTok-style short video feed with recommendation algorithm
Random video chat with interest matching and moderation exists
Tinder-style matching with swipe, preferences, and compatibility scoring works
Safety features (reporting, blocking, verification, moderation) are complete
QuantAI has full AI assistant with multi-modal chat interface
Device control (phone, laptop) with screen reading and command execution exists
Automation workflow builder with triggers and actions is implemented
Ecosystem-wide AI control panel for managing AI across all apps exists
Model management with fine-tuning and custom training is in place
Plugin system for extending AI capabilities exists
